name: ai-bias-detector
description: Chrome extension to detect bias in AI recommendations

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run build:content && npm run build:sw && npm run build:popup && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: cp manifest.json dist/ && mkdir -p dist/popup dist/content && cp src/popup/popup.html dist/popup/ && cp src/content/content.css dist/content/ && cp -r icons dist/ && cp -r src/_locales dist/
